title: Hi, I am not able to do dashboard level filtering on dashboard created by connecting multiple boards. Could someone help me know on how to do dashboard level filtering for dashboards created by connecting multiple boards in Monday.com?
excerpt: Hi, I am not able to do dashboard level filtering on dashboard created by connecting multiple boards. Could someone help me know on how to do dashboard level filtering for dashboards created by connecting multiple boards…

posts.author: Gopinath (GOPINATH MOHANAKUMAR)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I am not able to do dashboard level filtering on dashboard created by connecting multiple boards. Could someone help me know on how to do dashboard level filtering for dashboards created by connecting multiple boards in Monday.com?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Gopinath,

Is this what you’re referring to?

In order to filter a dashboard connected to multiple boards you need to filter to the specific connected board, as shown in the recording.

Let me know if this makes sense

posts.author: Gopinath (GOPINATH MOHANAKUMAR)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Thanks! Yes, I was referring to this filtering dashboard connected to multiple boards. But it becomes difficult task when we have connecting around 10 or more boards.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
I definitely hear where you’re coming from here.

I will take this with the dedicated team internally and let you know if we have plans to make the relevant changes in the future. I will get back to you as soon as I can

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your patience with me @Gopinath!

I have some exciting news for you! Our product team is currently working on fixing the filtering functionality in dashboards, with an aim (that is subject to change) to release this by end of Q1 - stay tuned for further updates

posts.author: Gopinath (GOPINATH MOHANAKUMAR)
posts.cookedHtml: That is great news. Thank you for the prompt response Biance!

posts.author: Gopinath (GOPINATH MOHANAKUMAR)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Is the new release of the filtering functionality in Monday.com dashboard been released ? There was supposed to be a release from product team working on fixing the filtering functionality in dashboards, with an aim (that is subject to change) to release this by end of Q1 2024.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Gopinath @scottror if you need this functionality now, I suggest taking a look at the Screenful app, which provides advanced analytics of monday.com data. You create charts across any number of boards and filter them by any item property.

You can place the charts on a Monday dashboard or schedule via email or Slack.

Here’s the guide for getting started with the free trial.
